title: Kerala Style Dosa Recipe | Red & White Coconut Chutney
description: Ingredients. Raw rice- 1kg Urud dal -1/2kg Fenugreek seed -1 tsp
ingredients: Raw rice- 1kg | Urud dal -1/2kg | Fenugreek seed -1 tsp | Salt -1or 2 tsp
instructions: Take a pan add raw rice, urad dal, and fenugreek seed. | Then add sufficient amount of water and soak for 2 hrs. | After soaking drain and again wash with clear water and set aside. | Then grinded the soaked ingredients by using grinder . | Add sufficient water and grind them well into smooth batter. | Then transfer the batter into a bowl and fermented for 1 or 2 hrs. | After fermentation add some salt and combine them well. | Heat a cast iron pan. | When the pan becomes hot, pour and spread the batter. | Once the dosa edges look lacy and golden-brown and the top has dried out completely then | flip the other side and cook for few minutes , remove to a plate. | Serve the delicious dosa with chutney . | Coconut chutney recipe | Coconut – ½ cup | Shallots- 4 or5 nos | Curry leaves -3sprigs | Green chilli – 2 nos | Dry red chillies – 2 nos | Mustard seed – 1tsp | Salt – 1 tsp | Firstly we have to grind green chilli, salt and grated coconut into smooth paste.setaside , | Heat oil in a pan add mustard seed ,lets spluttered . | Add dry red chillies, chopped shallots and curry leaves saute for few minutes . | Then add grinded coconut mixture and mix them well. | Now pour some water and cook for 2 to 3 minutes. | Remove from fire and keep aside. | Dry red chilly chutney. | Shallots – 4 nos | Curry leaves – 2 or3 sprigs | Dry red chilli -3 or 4 nos | Salt -1 tsp. | Oil- 2 or3 tsp | Firstly we have to grind dry red chilli ,salt and shallots in to smooth paste and keep aside. | Heat oil in a pan add mustard seed ,lets them spluttered . | Add dry red chilli,shallots and curry leaves saute them well. | Then add grinded dry red chilli paste and saute them well. | Pour some water and salt ,cook for some minutes. | Remove from fire and keep a side. | Want to find a full list of the ingredients and cook this dish by yourself? | Download our Mobile Application : https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lessbugs.recipe_user
raw_text: Ingredients. Raw rice- 1kg Urud dal -1/2kg Fenugreek seed -1 tsp Salt -1or 2 tsp Method Take a pan add raw rice, urad dal, and fenugreek seed. Then add sufficient amount of water and soak for 2 hrs. After soaking drain and again wash with clear water and set aside. Then grinded the soaked ingredients by using grinder . Add sufficient water and grind them well into smooth batter. Then transfer the batter into a bowl and fermented for 1 or 2 hrs. After fermentation add some salt and combine them well. Heat a cast iron pan. When the pan becomes hot, pour and spread the batter. Once the dosa edges look lacy and golden-brown and the top has dried out completely then flip the other side and cook for few minutes , remove to a plate. Serve the delicious dosa with chutney . Coconut chutney recipe Ingredients Coconut – ½ cup Shallots- 4 or5 nos Curry leaves -3sprigs Green chilli – 2 nos Dry red chillies – 2 nos Mustard seed – 1tsp Salt – 1 tsp Method Firstly we have to grind green chilli, salt and grated coconut into smooth paste.setaside , Heat oil in a pan add mustard seed ,lets spluttered . Add dry red chillies, chopped shallots and curry leaves saute for few minutes . Then add grinded coconut mixture and mix them well. Now pour some water and cook for 2 to 3 minutes. Remove from fire and keep aside. Dry red chilly chutney. Ingredients Shallots – 4 nos Curry leaves – 2 or3 sprigs Dry red chilli -3 or 4 nos Salt -1 tsp. Oil- 2 or3 tsp Method Firstly we have to grind dry red chilli ,salt and shallots in to smooth paste and keep aside. Heat oil in a pan add mustard seed ,lets them spluttered . Add dry red chilli,shallots and curry leaves saute them well. Then add grinded dry red chilli paste and saute them well. Pour some water and salt ,cook for some minutes. Remove from fire and keep a side. Want to find a full list of the ingredients and cook this dish by yourself? raw_text: Please take a moment to like and subscribe ✿◕ ‿ ◕✿ http://www.youtube.com/c/MadhurasRecipeMarathi?sub_confirmation=1 MadhurasRecipe Marathi Whatsapp Number - 9112934976 Dosa is a popular south Indian dish. This can be breakfast, lunch or dinner too. Important step in making dosa is to make its batter. Do try this crispy, crunchy dosa and leave a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe. Ingredients: • 2 1/2 cups Rice • 1 cup Urad dal • 1/2 cup Poha / Flattened rice • 1 tbsp Chana dal • 1/4 tsp Fenugreek seeds • Salt to taste • Oil Method: • Take rice into a bowl and wash it really good with water 3-4 times. • Add enough water and soak it for about 4-5 hours. • Take urad dal, chana dal and fenugreek seeds into a bowl and wash them really good with water. • Add enough water and soak dal for about 4-5 hours. • Soak rice and dal separately. • Take dal into a blender pot and grind it fine. Add minimum water while grinding. • Transfer the ground dal into a pot. • Take pohe and wash them really good. No need to soak the pohe. • Blend rice and pohe together fine. Do not keep it coarse. • Take the ground rice and pohe out into the pot containing ground dal. • Add salt to taste and mix well. • Add a little water if required to adjust the consistency. Mix well. • You can add 1/2 tsp sugar in the batter if you want. • Cover and ferment the batter for about 10-12 hours or overnight. • After fermentation mix the batter well. • If you feel the batter is a little thick you can add water to adjust the consistency. • Heat up a pan on medium heat and add a little oil on it. Spread the oil well on the pan. • Add dosa batter at the center of the pan and spread it. • Roast the dosa on medium heat until it gets nice golden color. • Spread a little oil on dosa. • Take it off the pan and dosa is already. • You can serve the dosa with coconut chutney, sambar. Tips: • If you want crispier dosa, then increase the quantity of rice and decrease the quantity if dal. • Chana dal gives nice colour to dosa. • Pohe give nice net to dosa. • Sugar gives nice brown color to dosa. • If you want to make even dosa, then spread the batter with a spatula. • The pan should not be too hot while making dosa. If you add batter on hot pan it wiil turn into lumps immediately adding on pan. Batter will be cooked immediately and you won’t be able to spread the dosa. • To avoid that, turn off the gas while taking the dosa off the pan, wait for a minute and add next batter for dosa. title: Instant masala Dosa | 5 मिनट में मसाला डोसा | quick rawa recipe / aloo / Chutney | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: INSTANT MASALA DOSA - No fikar when you have good old Sooji/ Rava at home, right? Bas soaking ka dhyaan rakhiye... and jhatpat tiffin ready. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI
ingredients: 1 ½ cups Semolina, सूजी | 1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही | 1 cup Water, पानी | 2 heaped tbsp Poha (soaked) पोहा | 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2-3 tbsp Roasted chana dal, भुनी हुई चना दाल | ¼ tsp Baking soda or Eno, बेकिंग सोडा | 1 tsp Oil, तेल | 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल | 2 tbsp Urad dal, उड़द की दाल | 2 tbsp Chana dal, चना दाल | 1 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज | ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | 7-8 no. Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च | 2 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक | 4-5 no. Garlic cloves (roughly crushed) लहसुन | 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते | ¼ cup Jaggery, गुड़ | 2 tbsp Tamarind, soaked, इमली | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | Prepared Tadka, तयार किया हुआ तड़का | 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल | 1 tsp small Mustard seeds, बारीक राई | 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते | 5-6 no. Button chillies, बटन मिर्च | 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल | ¼ tsp Urad dal, उड़द की दाल | ¼ tsp Chana dal, चना दाल | ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, बारीक राई | A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग | 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च | 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते | 1 no. large Onion, sliced, प्याज | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 3-4 no. large Potatoes (boiled & mashed) उबले हुए आलू | Prepared Batter, तयार किया हुआ मिश्रण | 1-2 tsp Ghee, घी
instructions: For Dosa Batter | In a bowl, add semolina, curd, water, soaked poha, sugar, salt to taste, roasted chana dal and mix it well. | Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it until smooth consistency. | Add baking soda or eno, oil and give it a gentle mix. | Keep it aside for further use. | For Allam Chutney | In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add urad dal, chana dal, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, kashmiri red chillies, ginger, garlic, curry leaves and saute for a while on medium flames. | Transfer it to a bowl, add jaggery, tamarind and salt to taste. | Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. | Transfer it to a serving bowl, add prepared tadka and mix it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add small mustard seeds, curry leaves and let it splutter. | Add button chillies and saute it well. | Keep it aside for further use. | For Aloo Masala | In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, urad dal, chana dal, small mustard seeds and let it splutter. | Add a pinch of asafoetida, green chillies, curry leaves and saute it well for a minute. | Add onion, salt to taste and cook for 2-3 minutes until translucent on medium flames. | Add turmeric powder, potatoes and cook it for a while. | Keep it aside for further use. | Heat iron tawa or nonstick tawa and season it with oil. | Pour a ladle full of prepared dosa batter and cook it well until soft. | Drizzle some ghee, fold it from the middle and transfer it to a serving dish. | Garnish it with coriander sprig and butter. | Serve hot with prepared allam chutney and aloo masala. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: INSTANT MASALA DOSA - No fikar when you have good old Sooji/ Rava at home, right? Bas soaking ka dhyaan rakhiye... and jhatpat tiffin ready. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: 5 in 1 Breakfast recipes - https://youtu.be/jIurvPodGB8 Masala Bread Upma - https://youtu.be/y2GPMVUqHnU *********************** INSTANT MASALA DOSA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Dosa Batter 1 ½ cups Semolina, सूजी 1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही 1 cup Water, पानी 2 heaped tbsp Poha (soaked) पोहा 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tbsp Roasted chana dal, भुनी हुई चना दाल ¼ tsp Baking soda or Eno, बेकिंग सोडा 1 tsp Oil, तेल For Allam Chutney 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 2 tbsp Urad dal, उड़द की दाल 2 tbsp Chana dal, चना दाल 1 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 7-8 no. Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 2 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक 4-5 no. Garlic cloves (roughly crushed) लहसुन 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते ¼ cup Jaggery, गुड़ 2 tbsp Tamarind, soaked, इमली Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Prepared Tadka, तयार किया हुआ तड़का For Tadka 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp small Mustard seeds, बारीक राई 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते 5-6 no. Button chillies, बटन मिर्च For Aloo Masala 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल ¼ tsp Urad dal, उड़द की दाल ¼ tsp Chana dal, चना दाल ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, बारीक राई A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते 1 no. large Onion, sliced, प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 3-4 no. large Potatoes (boiled & mashed) उबले हुए आलू For Dosa Prepared Batter, तयार किया हुआ मिश्रण 1-2 tsp Ghee, घी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Butter, cubed, मक्खन Process For Dosa Batter In a bowl, add semolina, curd, water, soaked poha, sugar, salt to taste, roasted chana dal and mix it well. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it until smooth consistency. Add baking soda or eno, oil and give it a gentle mix. Keep it aside for further use. For Allam Chutney In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add urad dal, chana dal, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, kashmiri red chillies, ginger, garlic, curry leaves and saute for a while on medium flames. Transfer it to a bowl, add jaggery, tamarind and salt to taste. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. Transfer it to a serving bowl, add prepared tadka and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Tadka In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add small mustard seeds, curry leaves and let it splutter. Add button chillies and saute it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Aloo Masala In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, urad dal, chana dal, small mustard seeds and let it splutter. Add a pinch of asafoetida, green chillies, curry leaves and saute it well for a minute. Add onion, salt to taste and cook for 2-3 minutes until translucent on medium flames. Add turmeric powder, potatoes and cook it for a while. Keep it aside for further use. For Dosa Heat iron tawa or nonstick tawa and season it with oil. Pour a ladle full of prepared dosa batter and cook it well until soft. Drizzle some ghee, fold it from the middle and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with coriander sprig and butter. Serve hot with prepared allam chutney and aloo masala. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #instantdosa #masaladosa #ranveerbrar #ravadosa #soojidosa #dosamasala #masaladosai

Batter will be cooked immediately and you won’t be able to spread the dosa. • To avoid that, turn off the gas while taking the dosa off the pan, wait for a minute and add next batter for dosa. ingredients: Byadagi Chilli - 25 Nos | Garlic - 4 Cloves | Coriander Seeds - 3 Tbsp | Cumin Seeds - 1 Tbsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/2NTgTMv) | Salt - 1 Tsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/2vg124l) | Oil - 1 Tbsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/2RGYvrw) | Chana Dal - 1 Tsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/36IbEpv) | Urad Dal - 1 Tsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/2Ul3EZi) | Cumin Seeds - 1 Tsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/2NTgTMv) | Mustard Seeds - 1/2 Tsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/2GUoDKd) | Asafoetida Powder - 1/2 Tsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/313n0Dm) | Onion - 1 No. Finely Chopped | Green Chilli - 3 Nos Chopped | Turmeric Powder - 1 Tsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/2RC4fm4) | Salt - 1 Tsp (Buy: https://amzn.to/2vg124l) | Boiled Potato - 5 Nos Chopped
instructions: To make the Spicy red chutney: | To a mixer jar add Byadagi chillies, garlic, coriander seeds, cumins seeds, curry leaves, salt, and gind it without water. | Now add some water and grind it into a fine paste. | To make the Potato masala | To a wide pan, add oil, channa dal, urad dal, mustard seeds, cumins seeds. | Once the mustard seeds spllater add asafoetida powder, curry leaves. | Then add onions, ginger, green chillies, and saute. | Once the onions are half cooked, add turmeric powder, salt, and mix it. | Add the boiled potatoes and mix it. | Add some water and start mashing the potatoes. | Finally add coriander leaves and mix. | To make the dosa: | Pour a laddle of dosa batter on the hot tawa. | Flatten the dosa and pour oil around the dosa. | Keep the flame on medium and spread the spicy red chutney over the dosa. | Pour some oil over the chutney, and spread it as well. | Now place the potato masala on one side of the dosa. | Sprinkle some onions and coriander leaves and fold it. | Mysore masala dosa is ready to be served. | You can buy our book and classes on https://www.21frames.in/shop | HAPPY COOKING WITH HOMECOOKING | ENJOY OUR RECIPES

To a mixer jar add Byadagi chillies, garlic, coriander seeds, cumins seeds, curry leaves, salt, and gind it without water. 2. Now add some water and grind it into a fine paste. To make the Potato masala 1. To a wide pan, add oil, channa dal, urad dal, mustard seeds, cumins seeds. 2. Once the mustard seeds spllater add asafoetida powder, curry leaves. 3. Then add onions, ginger, green chillies, and saute. 4. Once the onions are half cooked, add turmeric powder, salt, and mix it. 5. Add the boiled potatoes and mix it. 6. Add some water and start mashing the potatoes. 7. Finally add coriander leaves and mix. To make the dosa: 1. Pour a laddle of dosa batter on the hot tawa. 2. Flatten the dosa and pour oil around the dosa. 3. Keep the flame on medium and spread the spicy red chutney over the dosa. 4. Pour some oil over the chutney, and spread it as well. 5. Now place the potato masala on one side of the dosa. 6. Sprinkle some onions and coriander leaves and fold it. 7. Mysore masala dosa is ready to be served. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe. Ingredients: • 1 cup Fine Rava / Sooji • 2 tsp Rice flour • Water • Salt to taste • 1 tsp Lemon juice • 1 tbsp Green chili paste • Coriander leaves • Oil Method: • In a bowl take rava. • Add rice flour and mix well. • You can add maida or besan instead of rice flour. • Add water and make thin batter. Make sure batter should be runny and not thick at all. • Add salt, lemon juice, green chili paste, coriander leaves and mix well. • You can add curd instead of lemon juice. • You also can add little ginger if you like. • Heat up a pan on medium heat. The pan should neither too hot nor too cold. • Brush a little oil on the pan. Stir the batter well before making dosa. • Add batter starting from the edges and then at the centre. • Cook on medium heat for about 3-4 minutes. • When dosa gets nice golden color from lower side and if you feel upper side is raw, flip it over. • Cook from other side as well. • Take out the rava dosa into a plate. • Rava dosa is already. • Serve rava dosa with chutney. Tips: • Use raw rava only. No need to roast the rava. • Maida or besan gives nice binding to batter. • For each batch of making dosa stir the batter well before adding on the pan as rava settles down at the bottom. • As pan is hotter at the centre, start adding batter from the edges and finish at the center. instructions: To make the Spicy red chutney: | To a mixer jar add Byadagi chillies, garlic, coriander seeds, cumins seeds, curry leaves, salt, and gind it without water. | Now add some water and grind it into a fine paste. | To make the Potato masala | To a wide pan, add oil, channa dal, urad dal, mustard seeds, cumins seeds. | Once the mustard seeds spllater add asafoetida powder, curry leaves. | Then add onions, ginger, green chillies, and saute. | Once the onions are half cooked, add turmeric powder, salt, and mix it. | Add the boiled potatoes and mix it. | Add some water and start mashing the potatoes. | Finally add coriander leaves and mix. | To make the dosa: | Pour a laddle of dosa batter on the hot tawa. | Flatten the dosa and pour oil around the dosa. | Keep the flame on medium and spread the spicy red chutney over the dosa. | Pour some oil over the chutney, and spread it as well. | Now place the potato masala on one side of the dosa. | Sprinkle some onions and coriander leaves and fold it. | Mysore masala dosa is ready to be served. | You can buy our book and classes on https://www.21frames.in/shop | HAPPY COOKING WITH HOMECOOKING | ENJOY OUR RECIPES

To a mixer jar add Byadagi chillies, garlic, coriander seeds, cumins seeds, curry leaves, salt, and gind it without water. 2. Now add some water and grind it into a fine paste. To make the Potato masala 1. To a wide pan, add oil, channa dal, urad dal, mustard seeds, cumins seeds. 2. Once the mustard seeds spllater add asafoetida powder, curry leaves. 3. Then add onions, ginger, green chillies, and saute. 4. Once the onions are half cooked, add turmeric powder, salt, and mix it. 5. Add the boiled potatoes and mix it. 6. Add some water and start mashing the potatoes. 7. Finally add coriander leaves and mix. To make the dosa: 1. Pour a laddle of dosa batter on the hot tawa. 2. Flatten the dosa and pour oil around the dosa. 3. Keep the flame on medium and spread the spicy red chutney over the dosa. 4. Pour some oil over the chutney, and spread it as well. 5. Now place the potato masala on one side of the dosa. 6. Sprinkle some onions and coriander leaves and fold it. 7. Mysore masala dosa is ready to be served. Soak the green gram for 12 hours in water. 2. Transfer the soaked green gram into a muslin cloth, close the cloth, drain the excess water and let the soaked green gram rest for 12 hours for sprouting. 3. Keep the sprouted green gram aside. 4. Soak the raw rice/parboiled rice in water for 1 hour. 5. Now take the soaked rice with water, chopped green chilies, chopped ginger, rock salt, cumin seeds, turmeric powder, asafoetida powder, sprouted green gram in a mixer jar and pulse a few times without adding the water. 6.
